title: The Shift to Localisation: What It Means for Your NGO
author: CapacityHub Editorial
content: Localisation is more than a buzzword. It represents a fundamental shift in how international development is funded and managed. This article explores how local NGOs can position themselves for direct funding by strengthening their internal compliance systems...

title: 5 Common Mistakes in Proposal Writing
author: Jane Doe, Grant Expert
content: Even the most impactful projects can go unfunded if the proposal fails to communicate clearly. The top mistakes include ignoring donor guidelines, providing vague budgets, and lacking a clear sustainability plan...
